changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-common/src/lib.rs:110-124

Coverage: 0% (0/8 lines)

Uncovered lines: 111-114, 120-123

Functions: impl Display for Pretty<T>::fmt, impl Debug for Pretty<T>::fmt

Pretty is a wrapper for pretty-printing types as YAML in logs. Both fmt impls attempt serde_yaml_ng::to_string and fall back to Debug formatting on error. Test both paths: successful YAML serialization and the fallback path when serialization fails (e.g., a type that implements Debug but fails serde).
Add tests for Pretty Display/Debug impls
